name: V3 governed source-promotion smoke suite
purpose: Paraphrased diagnostics for governed decision families promoted from already-collected sources. These are not a launch holdout and must not be used for prompt-specific rules.

conversations.title: Offer and document boundaries
prompts: A new applicant is asking us to commit to a whole season. Should we begin with one episode or promise the series?
A prospect wants a document comparing Lite and Standard after I explain both. Am I allowed to send the License Options document?
The client's first ISTV purchase was Standard. Are they entitled to the VIP repeat-customer discount when buying VIP for another show?

conversations.title: Lead and approval procedures
prompts: Another rep claimed a 20 percent lead, but I cannot see a booked call. What should I do before contacting the lead?
The applicant's social check is marked failed. Should I send the greenlight letter?
What should I do if the reason for the failed check is unclear?

conversations.title: Sensitive and post-sale boundaries
prompts: The contract is signed, the ACH failed, and the client now wants out. Which team needs to be notified?
Should I automatically disqualify every applicant who served time years ago?
Where is the current studio located?
